title: Plutarch, Moralia: On Love of Wealth
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: On Love of Wealth.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: On Love of Wealth.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'On Love of Wealth': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
